sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76389" key="o)ywni/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀψων-ίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n76389.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀψωνιάζομαι, παρὰ βασιλέων</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).137</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
